name: Unauthorized Reactivation
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>無許可の再奇動</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>メイルファクターズ・コマンド</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Target 1 Machine monster you control; equip 1 appropriate Machine Union monster from your hand or Deck to that monster, but the Union monster you equipped cannot be Special Summoned this turn. You can only activate 1 "Unauthorized Reactivation" per turn.
eff: Target 1 Machine monster you control; equip 1 appropriate Machine Union monster from your hand or Deck to that monster, but the Union monster you equipped cannot be Special Summoned this turn. You can only activate 1 "Unauthorized Reactivation" per turn.

action: Equips monsters from the player's hand
Equips monsters from the player's Deck
